transcript: For Hotel A polyester, don't run it with cotton. It shrinks if you use the normal cotton cycle.
Dryer station 3 is usually better at 85°C for cotton. The SOP says 78°C but we often increase it when the batch is still wet.
If packaging line 2 sensor light stays on, don't ignore it. Stop the line and call maintenance.
Welding station 3 overheats after Tuesday lunch. Usually we reduce the current by 5 percent, but it should be checked by a supervisor.
Forklift batteries should never be charged near the production floor. Always move them to the charging area.
